title: sideritis perfoliata subsp. perfoliata
intro: Sideritis perfoliata subsp. perfoliata, also known as mountain tea or ironwort, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis perfoliata subsp. perfoliata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal teas, infusions, and supplements. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, dried leaves, or capsules, and is often consumed as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
